instruction: Help me change the 2 in "H2O" to a subscript.

evaluator.eval: compare_docx_files(get_vm_file(env, config={'path': '/home/user/Desktop/H2O_Factsheet_WA.docx', 'dest': 'H2O_Factsheet_WA.docx'}), get_cloud_file(env, config={'path': 'https://huggingface.co/datasets/xlangai/ubuntu_osworld_file_cache/resolve/main/libreoffice_writer/0b17a146-2934-46c7-8727-73ff6b6483e8/H2O_Factsheet_WA_Gold.docx', 'dest': 'H2O_Factsheet_WA_Gold.docx'})) and compare_subscript_contains(get_vm_file(env, config={'path': '/home/user/Desktop/H2O_Factsheet_WA.docx', 'dest': 'H2O_Factsheet_WA.docx'}), get_cloud_file(env, config={'path': 'https://huggingface.co/datasets/xlangai/ubuntu_osworld_file_cache/resolve/main/libreoffice_writer/0b17a146-2934-46c7-8727-73ff6b6483e8/H2O_Factsheet_WA_Gold.docx', 'dest': 'H2O_Factsheet_WA_Gold.docx'}))
